lead.titleZh: 卒中后物理与认知联合康复对预防痴呆的潜在益处：一项观察研究
lead.titleEn: Combined Physical and Cognitive Rehab for Post-Stroke Dementia Prevention: An Observational Study
lead.paragraphZh: 今日日报共收录 17 条更新，涵盖 6 个专科方向。神经康复领域有 6 篇条目，其中一篇美国多中心回顾性观察研究，探讨了物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆的关系， curatedScore 85 分，最值得关注。此外，儿童康复领域的 1 篇系统综述和神经康复领域的 1 篇 RCT 亦有较高分数，分别为 80 分。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's daily update includes 17 entries across 6 specialties. In neurorehabilitation, a U.S. multicenter retrospective observational study on the association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia scored 85, making it the top item. Additionally, a systematic review in pediatric rehabilitation and an RCT in neurorehabilitation both received a score of 80.

items.title: Kinesiophobia and its impact on shoulder function in patients following arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon: a cross-sectional study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study (N=129) assessed shoulder function and kinesiophobia levels in patients six weeks after arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon, exploring their interrelationships to inform recovery and patient outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症（kinesiophobia）是一个关键的心理康复障碍。这项研究通过评估术后 6 周的运动恐惧症与肩关节功能的关系，提示早期识别和干预运动恐惧症可能有助于改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症及其对肩关节功能的影响：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究（N=129）评估了在肩袖关节镜修复术后 6 周患者的肩关节功能和运动恐惧症水平，并探讨了它们之间的相互关系，以期为改善康复和患者预后提供见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiophobia is a critical psychological barrier to rehabilitation in patients after rotator cuff repair. This study, by evaluating the relationship between kinesiophobia and shoulder function 6 weeks post-surgery, suggests that early identification and intervention for kinesiophobia may improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确定运动恐惧症与肩关节功能之间的因果关系，且随访时间较短（6周）。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to determine causality between kinesiophobia and shoulder function, and has a short follow-up period (6 weeks).

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found an association between smartphone addiction and impaired postural balance performance, with attention-demanding tasks further affecting balance control.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机成瘾正悄然影响年轻人的姿势和平衡，这篇观察性研究提示我们应关注数字设备过度使用对肌骨健康的潜在风险，尤其是在评估平衡障碍时。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：青年人姿势稳定性调查的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）进行的横断面研究发现，智能手机成瘾与姿势平衡能力受损之间存在关联，且对注意力要求高的任务会进一步影响平衡控制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone addiction is subtly impacting posture and balance in young adults. This observational study suggests we should consider the potential musculoskeletal health risks of excessive digital device use, especially when evaluating balance impairments.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立数字成瘾与姿势平衡障碍之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish a causal relationship between digital addiction and postural balance impairments.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma myofascial injection for chronic low back pain: a retrospective study
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (N=58) evaluated the efficacy and safety of ultrasound-guided myofascial platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection compared to normal saline for myofascial pain syndrome-induced chronic low back pain, assessing pain intensity via VAS and functional disability by ODI.
items.curatedReason: 富血小板血浆（PRP）在慢性腰痛中的应用是一个热门但证据仍在积累的领域。这项回顾性研究提示超声引导下的 PRP 肌筋膜注射对肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛可能有效，但结果仍需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下富血小板血浆肌筋膜注射治疗慢性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（N=58）评估了超声引导下富血小板血浆（PRP）肌筋膜注射与生理盐水相比，治疗肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛的疗效和安全性，通过 VAS 评估疼痛强度，ODI 评估功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) in chronic low back pain is a trending field with accumulating evidence. This retrospective study suggests that ultrasound-guided PRP myofascial injection may be effective for chronic low back pain caused by myofascial pain syndrome, but higher quality RCTs are needed to validate these results.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，未随机分组，可能存在选择偏倚，且样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study with no randomized allocation, potential for selection bias, and a small sample size.

items.title: Expert consensus on the management of nocturnal enuresis in children | World Journal of Pediatrics
items.summary: This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines on managing nocturnal enuresis in children, incorporating substantial clinical experience and international guidelines to address its impact on children's physical and psychological health.
items.curatedReason: 儿童夜间遗尿影响广泛，最新管理策略至关重要。这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版指南，融合了新的临床经验和国际指导，你应该参照它来标准化你的诊断和治疗流程。
items.titleZh: 儿童夜间遗尿管理专家共识
items.summaryZh: 这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版儿童夜间遗尿管理指南，结合了丰富的临床经验和国际指南，旨在解决夜间遗尿对儿童身心健康的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Nocturnal enuresis in children has broad impacts, and up-to-date management strategies are crucial. This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines, integrating new clinical experience and international guidance; you should refer to it to standardize your diagnostic and treatment processes.

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study investigated the association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia.
items.curatedReason: 这项美国多中心回顾性队列研究表明，物理和认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆的发生率降低相关。它提示你在卒中康复中应重视早期启动联合干预，这对于长期认知预后可能具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆的关系：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究探讨了物理和认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生率之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study suggests that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation is associated with a reduced incidence of post-stroke dementia. This highlights the potential importance of early combined interventions in stroke rehabilitation for long-term cognitive outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, this research may be subject to confounding factors and selection bias, precluding the establishment of causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: An RCT compared intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) versus nasogastric tube feeding (NG) in post-stroke dysphagia patients, aiming to assess efficacy in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难患者的鼻胃管喂养常见，但胃食管反流风险高。这项研究提示，间歇性口咽食管管喂养在减少反流风险和促进吞咽功能恢复上可能优于鼻胃管，为你的临床选择提供了新思路，下次评估时可以考虑。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难患者间歇性口咽食管管饲与鼻胃管饲的胃动力、反流风险及临床疗效多模态评估：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验旨在比较间歇性口咽食管管饲（IOE）与鼻胃管饲（NG）在卒中后吞咽困难患者中，在降低反流风险和支持吞咽功能恢复方面的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Nasogastric tube feeding is common for post-stroke dysphagia, but carries a high risk of reflux. This study suggests that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may be superior to nasogastric tubes in reducing reflux risk and promoting swallowing recovery. This offers a new perspective for your clinical choices; consider it in future assessments.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供具体的样本量、干预方案或关键结局数据。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide specific sample size, intervention protocols, or key outcome data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review identified outcome domains and measures in core outcome sets for stroke, traumatic brain injury, and spinal cord injury, noting that existing sets have not been synthesized across conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述提示，核心结局集和标准结局测量集在神经康复领域存在异质性。在设计你的临床路径和研究方案时，注意不同神经损伤（脊髓、卒中、脑外伤）间的测量工具可能缺乏统一性。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及其测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了卒中、创伤性脑损伤和脊髓损伤的核心结局集与标准结局测量集中的结局域和测量方法，并指出现有集合尚未在不同疾病间进行整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review indicates heterogeneity in core outcome sets and standard outcome measures across neurorehabilitation. When designing your clinical pathways and research protocols, be aware that measurement tools may lack uniformity across different neurological injuries (spinal cord, stroke, TBI).
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重梳理现有研究的范围和类型，未进行荟萃分析或提供效应量。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focused on mapping the scope and types of existing research rather than conducting meta-analysis or providing effect sizes.

items.title: Factors influencing virtual reality use in paediatric acquired ...
items.summary: This qualitative study explored factors influencing virtual reality (VR) use in pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation, providing insights into practical implementation.
items.curatedReason: 别盲目引入 VR 到儿科脑损伤上肢康复中。这项定性研究揭示了影响其应用的实际因素。你应该了解这些障碍与促进因素，才能更有效地整合 VR 技术，确保其在临床实践中的成功。
items.titleZh: 影响虚拟现实在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了影响虚拟现实（VR）在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素，为实际应用提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't blindly introduce VR into pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation. This qualitative study reveals practical factors influencing its use. You should understand these barriers and facilitators to integrate VR technology more effectively and ensure its success in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普遍性受限，主要关注使用者感知而非客观疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability, and focuses on user perceptions rather than objective efficacy.

items.title: Harnessing neuroplasticity to improve motor performance ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines the design for the GAME randomized controlled trial, which aims to harness neuroplasticity to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项研究方案，而非结果。GAME RCT 旨在通过神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现。你在设计类似儿童神经康复研究时，可以参考其方法学框架，但切勿将其内容作为临床实践依据。
items.titleZh: 利用神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现：GAME 随机对照试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案概述了 GAME 随机对照试验的设计，该试验旨在利用神经可塑性来改善脑瘫婴儿的运动表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol, not a result. The GAME RCT aims to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy by harnessing neuroplasticity. You may refer to its methodological framework when designing similar pediatric neurorehabilitation studies, but do not use its content as a basis for clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布结果，无法评估干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol with no results yet, so the intervention's effectiveness cannot be evaluated.

items.title: Corynoxine inhibts ferroptosis by SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 axis on traumatic brain injury
items.summary: This study investigated Corynoxine's neuroprotective effects against traumatic brain injury (TBI) in a mouse model and Erastin-induced HT-22 neuronal cells, elucidating its mechanism in inhibiting ferroptosis via the SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 signaling axis.
items.curatedReason: Corynoxine 在创伤性脑损伤（TBI）中的神经保护作用研究提供了潜在的药物干预方向。尽管这项研究主要关注分子机制，但其发现可能启发未来结合药物和物理康复的 TBI 治疗策略。
items.titleZh: Corynoxine 通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 轴抑制铁死亡，对抗创伤性脑损伤
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在小鼠模型和 Erastin 诱导的 HT-22 神经元细胞中，探讨了 Corynoxine 对创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的神经保护作用，阐明了其通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 信号轴抑制铁死亡的机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research into the neuroprotective effects of Corynoxine in traumatic brain injury (TBI) offers a potential direction for pharmacological intervention. Although this study primarily focuses on molecular mechanisms, its findings may inspire future TBI treatment strategies combining medication and physical rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究主要基于动物模型和细胞实验，其结果的临床转化性和在人体 TBI 中的疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This study is primarily based on animal models and cell experiments, so the clinical translatability and efficacy in human TBI are unclear.

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.

items.title: The effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults: a systematic review | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction (BFR-RE) on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults, identifying it as a promising strategy for those unable to perform high-intensity resistance exercise.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年患者，血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）是一个值得推荐的有效策略。这份系统综述确认了 BFR-RE 在改善肌肉表现、增加肌肉量和功能方面的效果，你应该考虑将其纳入老年患者的训练方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制抗阻训练对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述评估了血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响，认为这是一种对无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年人有前景的策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood flow restriction resistance exercise (BFR-RE) is an important strategy for improving muscle performance and function in older adults, especially those unable to perform high-intensity training. This systematic review evaluates the effects of BFR-RE, which can help you develop evidence-based training programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受限于纳入研究的异质性、方法学质量以及 BFR-RE 具体方案（如压力、时间、训练量）的差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of this review may be limited by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of included studies, as well as variations in BFR-RE protocols (e.g., pressure, duration, volume).

items.title: Associations of exercise frequency and type with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK | BMC Medicine
items.summary: This study examined how exercise frequency and type are associated with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK, aiming to understand their joint effects on delaying functional decline.
items.curatedReason: 了解不同运动频率和类型对老年人日常活动限制轨迹的影响，有助于你为患者提供更精准的运动建议。这项研究揭示了英国老年人群中的这些关联，强调了定期运动在延缓功能衰退中的作用。
items.titleZh: 英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联，旨在了解它们在延缓功能衰退方面的联合作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding how different exercise frequencies and types impact trajectories of daily activity limitations in older adults helps you provide more precise exercise recommendations. This study reveals these associations in the UK older adult population, highlighting the role of regular exercise in delaying functional decline.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确定运动频率/类型与日常活动限制轨迹之间的因果关系，且基于自我报告的运动数据可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between exercise frequency/type and daily activity limitation trajectories, and self-reported exercise data may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Activity profiles and their associations with transitions between fall and dementia: findings from a multistate time-to-event analysis | Alzheimer's Research & Therapy
items.summary: This study, using a multistate time-to-event analysis, investigated the associations of activity profiles with transitions between falls and dementia, providing insights into potential risk factors in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 跌倒和痴呆是老年人常见的双重打击。这项研究通过多状态时间事件分析，探讨了不同日常活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，提示特定活动模式可能预示这两种不良结局，这有助于你进行早期风险评估。
items.titleZh: 活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联：一项多状态时间事件分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用多状态时间事件分析，调查了活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，为老年人潜在的风险因素提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Falls and dementia are common dual burdens in older adults. This study, using multistate time-to-event analysis, explores the association between daily activity profiles and transitions between falls and dementia, suggesting that specific activity patterns may predict these adverse outcomes. This can aid in early risk assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法建立活动模式与跌倒/痴呆转换之间的因果关系，且结果可能受其他未测量混杂因素影响。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between activity profiles and transitions to falls/dementia, and results may be influenced by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Timely management of COPD exacerbations is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery: a prospective observational study | Respiratory Research
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, highlighting the importance of early recognition and prompt treatment in routine outpatient settings.
items.curatedReason: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理对患者康复至关重要。这项前瞻性观察研究强调，早期识别和治疗与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，这强化了你在临床实践中快速响应 AECOPDs 的重要性。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病急性加重及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关：一项前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，强调了在常规门诊环境中早期识别和及时治疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is crucial for patient recovery. This prospective observational study emphasizes that early recognition and treatment are associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, reinforcing the importance of rapid response to AECOPDs in your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法排除混杂因素对及时管理与预后之间关联的影响，且结果可能不具备普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding the exclusion of confounders influencing the association between timely management and prognosis, and results may not be generalizable.

items.title: Smartphone apps, wearable trackers helped people with heart disease boost physical activity
items.summary: An analysis of previous research published in the Journal of the American Heart Association found that smartphone apps, fitness trackers, and wearable devices helped people with heart disease boost physical activity, which is crucial for preventing additional cardiovascular events.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备在帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动方面的作用日益显著。这项研究分析指出，这些技术是促进心血管疾病患者重获运动能力、预防二次事件的有效辅助工具。
items.titleZh: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动
items.summaryZh: 《美国心脏协会杂志》发表的一项研究分析发现，智能手机应用、健身追踪器和可穿戴设备有助于心脏病患者增加体力活动，这对于预防额外的心血管事件至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone apps and wearable devices are increasingly important in helping people with heart disease increase physical activity. This analysis indicates these technologies are effective aids in promoting exercise capacity and preventing secondary events in cardiovascular disease patients.
items.limitation: 作为对现有研究的分析，其结论强度取决于原始研究的质量和异质性，可能无法提供确凿的因果证据。
items.limitationEn: As an analysis of existing research, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the original studies, and it may not provide definitive causal evidence.

flashes.title: Neuroprotective Effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 Against Ischemic Stroke Injury Through Regulating Microglial State Transition and Ferroptosis via miR-214-3p/GPX4 Axis | Neurochemical Research
flashes.titleZh: lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 通过 miR-214-3p/GPX4 轴调控小胶质细胞状态转换和铁死亡，发挥抗缺血性卒中损伤的神经保护作用
